ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source:
Enter your password
(Obsidian Translate)

Recover encrypted API keys from your settings by entering your password.

You can reopen this modal via the plugin settings at any time.
ast.target:
输入你的密码
(Obsidian Translate)

通过输入密码从设置中恢复已加密的 API 密钥。

你可以随时通过插件设置重新打开此弹窗。

ast.name: error
ast.target: 错误：未找到翻译器语言环境

ast.name: log
ast.target: 加载 wasm 模块时出错。

ast.name: log
ast.target: 加载 wasm 模块时出错：

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Password is invalid, keys are still encrypted
ast.target: 密码无效，密钥仍被加密

ast.name: description
ast.source: Obfuscate sensitive data such as API keys and tokens
ast.target: 对 API 密钥和令牌等敏感数据进行混淆处理

ast.name: description
ast.source: Do not show the keys required to trigger the button's shortcut
ast.target: 不显示触发按钮快捷键所需的按键

ast.name: description
ast.source: FastText will be used as the default language detection service
ast.target: FastText 将用作默认语言检测服务

ast.name: description
ast.source: Install FastText language models for local language detection (size: 1.72MiB)
ast.target: 安装用于本地语言检测的 FastText 语言模型（大小：1.72MiB）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Determine whether glossary operation should be applied locally or by the online service
ast.target: 确定术语表操作应在本地执行还是由在线服务执行

ast.name: description
ast.source: Translate sentences using provided glossary terms
ast.target: 使用提供的术语表词条翻译句子

ast.name: description
ast.source: Translation view: determine which action will be executed when pressing the language switch button
ast.target: 翻译视图：确定按下语言切换按钮时将执行的操作

ast.name: description
ast.source: Determines how the text selection will be translated using translate commands
ast.target: 确定使用翻译 命令 时如何翻译所选文本

ast.name: description
ast.source: This will be the default source language used when opening a translation view
ast.target: 打开翻译视图时将使用此默认源语言

ast.name: description
ast.source: This will determine which language will be translated to by default
ast.target: 这将确定默认翻译成哪种语言

ast.name: description
ast.target: 插件 命令 使用的服务

ast.name: description
ast.source: Selection of languages available for global commands
ast.target: 可用于全局命令的语言选择

ast.name: description
ast.source: Determine how API keys will be stored on the device
ast.target: 确定 API 密钥在设备上的存储方式

ast.name: description
ast.source: Only the selected services will be visible in settings, modals and commands
ast.target: 仅选定的服务会在设置、模态框和命令中可见

ast.name: description
ast.source:
When a glossary entry is added or updated,
an entry will be added or updated for the reverse language pair as well
ast.target:
当添加或更新术语条目时，
也会为反向语言对添加或更新条目

ast.name: description
ast.source: When you're finished with editing your glossary, sync it to selected translation service
ast.target: 完成术语表编辑后，将其同步到所选翻译服务

ast.name: description
ast.target: 安装 Bergamot 翻译引擎（大小：5.00MiB）

ast.name: description
ast.target: 翻译服务的 API 密钥

ast.name: description
ast.source: If applicable, set the issue region of the API key
ast.target: 如适用，设置 API 密钥的签发地区

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enter the URL of the translation service

ast.name: description
ast.source: Select which model to use for translation

ast.name: description
ast.source: Ensure that the translation service is set-up properly
ast.target: 确保翻译服务已正确设置

ast.name: description
ast.source: How long after the user stops typing should the translation be performed (in milliseconds)
ast.target: 用户停止输入后多久执行翻译（毫秒）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Update the list of languages that can be used for the server-side glossary
ast.target: 更新可用于服务器端词汇表的语言列表

ast.name: description
ast.source: Determine if sentences should be split into separate lines
ast.target: 确定是否将句子拆分为单独行

ast.name: description
ast.source: Do not change the formatting of the source text
ast.target: 不要更改源文本的格式

ast.name: description
ast.source: How formal should the translation be

ast.name: description
ast.source: If profanity should be filtered out of the translation
ast.target: 是否应从翻译中过滤脏话

ast.name: description
ast.source: The type of marker to use when masking profanity
ast.target: 遮蔽脏话时使用的标记类型

ast.name: description
ast.source: Translate text as it is being typed

ast.name: description
ast.source: Languages available when using the 'Selection Mode' filter
ast.target: 使用“选择模式”筛选时可用的语言

ast.name: description
ast.source: Update the list of available languages

ast.source: Set the service used for this view
ast.target: 设置用于此视图的服务

ast.name: description
ast.source: Replace words with their glossary translation
ast.target: 用其术语表翻译替换单词

ast.name: description
ast.source: Set which languages are visible for this view
ast.target: 设置此视图中可见的语言

ast.name: info
ast.source: API keys will not be saved to data.json, keys are only stored locally
ast.target: API 密钥不会保存到 data.json，密钥仅存储在本地

ast.name: info
ast.source: API keys will be cleared when Obsidian is closed
ast.target: 关闭 Obsidian 时将清除 API 密钥

ast.name: message
ast.source: This should not ever be called

ast.target: 访问IP不在可访问IP列表中

ast.name: text
ast.source: Disabling this setting might introduce some visual bugs
ast.target: 禁用此设置可能会引入一些视觉错误

ast.name: text
ast.source: Useful for sharing a screenshot of your settings without showing the secret data
ast.target: 用于分享设置截图而不显示敏感数据

ast.name: text
ast.source: Setting applies to global commands (e.g. translating selections) and to newly opened translation views
ast.target: 设置适用于全局命令（例如翻译选中内容）以及新打开的翻译视图

ast.name: text
ast.source: This option requires FastText to resolve the language of the input text
ast.target: 此选项需要 FastText 来识别输入文本的语言

ast.name: text
ast.source: Used for the editor context menu and translating files
ast.target: 用于编辑器上下文菜单和翻译文件

ast.name: text
ast.source: If the online glossary does not support a specific language pair, or if the service does not support online glossaries at all, glossary entries can be applied locally if `Local Glossary` setting is enabled
ast.target: 如果在线术语表不支持特定的语言对，或该服务根本不支持在线术语表，只要启用 `Local Glossary` 设置，术语表条目就可以在本地应用

ast.name: text
ast.source: Automatic language detection is disabled, install FastText to enable this feature
ast.target: 自动语言检测已禁用，安装 FastText 以启用此功能

ast.name: text
ast.source: Disclaimer: The engine was recompiled by me to a newer version, as no up-to-date official binary is available
ast.target: 免责声明：由于没有最新的官方二进制文件，该引擎由我重新编译为更新版本

ast.name: text
ast.source: ⓘ Sign up for an API key here
ast.target: ⓘ 在此注册获取 API 密钥

ast.name: text
ast.target: API 密钥仍为加密状态

ast.name: text
ast.source: ⓘ You can host this service locally
ast.target: ⓘ 你可以在本地部署此服务

ast.name: text
ast.source: ⓘ GPT-4 can be more expensive but result in more accurate translations
ast.target: ⓘ GPT-4 可能更昂贵，但翻译更准确

ast.name: text
ast.target: 并非所有语言都支持正式程度

ast.name: text
ast.source: May result in the character quota of the service being spent more quickly
ast.target: 可能会更快耗尽服务的字符配额

ast.name: text
ast.source: The delay for the automatic translation can be set in the global translation service settings
ast.target: 自动翻译的延迟可在全局翻译服务设置中设置

ast.name: text
ast.source: Global 'glossary' option has not been activated yet, you can enable it in the 'Functionality' settings tab
ast.target: 全局“术语表”选项尚未启用，您可以在“功能”设置选项卡中启用它

ast.name: text
ast.source: Manual language selection can be set in the service's settings
ast.target: 手动语言选择可在服务设置中设置

ast.name: tooltip
ast.target: API 密钥仍为加密状态
